case_title: JONATHAN FRIED VS. ANTHONY'S AUTO CRAFT ET AL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-06-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-03-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRIED, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT ANTHONY'S AUTO CRAFT BALLENGER, TODD T SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-03-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-30-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-10-2018
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-06-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
